name: miro
description: Reads and writes documented Miro Platform, Enterprise, SCIM, and experimental REST API resources through the Miro Developer Platform API.

risk.read: external Miro API reads across board, enterprise, SCIM, user-group, project, and experimental resources
risk.write: external Miro API mutations including board sharing, item changes, enterprise administration, SCIM provisioning, groups, projects, and deletes
risk.approval: required for every write action; destructive deletes require destructive confirmation
